expectations.text: Questions cover key dimensions: target audience, product/service, visual style, tech stack, content needs
expectations.evidence: Questions covered: CTA goal (sign up), product type (POS SaaS), target audience (small restaurants in Thailand), deal-breakers (no cheap look, not too long), language (Thai), design approach (SaaS style), references (Square, Loyverse), tech stack (Next.js), timeline (3-4 days), team (solo, no designer), quality criteria (professional look, clean code, responsive).

expectations.text: Final improved prompt is self-contained — usable without the discovery summary
expectations.evidence: The improved prompt includes all necessary information inline: product details, design direction, page structure, technical requirements, and constraints. It can be used standalone with any AI.

expectations.text: Output includes a Discovery Summary with Goal, Direction, Reference, Context, and Criteria
expectations.evidence: Discovery Summary is present with all 5 sections: Goal, Direction, Reference, Context, and Criteria — each accurately reflecting the conversation.

expectations.text: Improved prompt includes specific details (audience, style, features) — not generic template
expectations.evidence: Prompt is highly specific: 'ระบบ POS ร้านอาหาร', 'ร้านอาหารเล็กๆ ในไทย', 'คล้ายแนว Square for Restaurants', 'Next.js App Router + Tailwind CSS', 'dark mode support'. Far more specific than the baseline's bracket-fill template.
